name: Mrs. D's Chocolate Peanut Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325°F.
2. Toast the peanuts on a baking sheet in the preheated oven for about 6-7 minutes, or until golden brown. Remove and set aside.
3. Lightly coat the insides of a 9-by-9-by-2-inch square cake pan with 1/2 teaspoon butter.
4. In a 2 1/2-quart saucepan, heat sugar, milk, cocoa, and salt over medium heat until smooth and sugar is dissolved. Bring to a boil.
5. Continue cooking at medium-low heat until the mixture reaches a temperature of 245°F (about 22-25 minutes), stirring with a rubber spatula every 5-6 minutes.
6. Remove from heat and stir in remaining butter and vanilla extract.
7. Fold in peanuts and pour into prepared cake pan.
8. Allow to cool to room temperature for about 45 minutes, then cut and serve.
